msContents.summary: This edition of the Amarakoṣa includes a Sinhalese commentary by Wimalajoti Thero, based on previous printed commentaries in Sinhalese and Sanskrit as well as, according to the preface, manuscript evidence.

listBibl.bibl: Vogel, Claus. 2013. Indian Lexicography. Revised edition. München: P. Kirchheim.

encodingDesc.p: ISO 15919 transliteration, apart from ṃ for anusvāra and ṛ for vocalic ṛ. Underscore to indicate explicit virāma.

body.head: namassarvajñāya.
body.p:
mē ślokaya budun·gē naisarggika guṇānusmaraṇayen buddha
sēvāva karaṇulæbēvayi yana abhiprāyen kiyanaladæyi mē nāma
liṅgānuśāsanayehi arttha kiyana væḍitara ācāryyayan·gē sammatayi.
brahma viṣṇu maheśādi sevā kiyana ladæyi samahara ācāryyayan·gē
matayi. bhaṭṭojidīkṣitācāryyātmaja bhānudīkṣitācārīhu gurusevā
dak·vana bavak mut buddhasēvā novet·yayida amarācāryyayan
saugatavīmehi hetunætæyida dæḍisē kiyati. mē ācāryyayan·gē
druṣṭi virodha heyin kiyana pamaṇak vinā bhāratī tomō guru
sevā artthaya sphuṭa nokaran·nīya. maheśvara nam ācāryyayan
visin viracitavū amarakoṣa viveka nam vyākhyānayehi mē buddhādi
kisiveku nodak·vā ślokārttha pamaṇak kiyati.
body.head: purātana san·naya.
body.p:
śāstrārambhayehi sarvajñayan·vahan·sēṭa pūjā vidhāna kaḷakal·hi
parahitānuśāsanayen vighnopasamaya karan·nāvū puṇyasam·pattiya
ræs·karan·nō “yasya jñānadayāsindhoḥ” yanādī mē ślokaya
dæk·vūha: jñāna, samasta vastuviṣayavū parijñānayen hā; dayā, duḥkha
yen samuddharaṇavāñjā lakṣaṇavū karuṇāyen; sindhoḥ, sāgaraya
vænivū nohot uktalakṣaṇavū jñānadayādedenāṭa vipulādhāra
heyin sāgaraya vænivū; agādhasya, anut visin pātālatala no
dak·nā lada jñānadayādedenāgē keḷavara ætiheyin pirisin̆dagata
nohæk·kāvū gāmbhīryya æti; yasya, yam sarvajñavarayak·hugē; guṇāḥ,
maitrīkṣamopaśamādī guṇayō; anaghāḥ, rāgādidoṣa rahitayō da;
dhīrāḥ, paṇḍitavaruṇi; akṣayaḥ, parama karuṇādī guṇaśālitvayen
parahita sukhasampādanayehilā kṣayak næt·tāvū hevat virāmayak
næt·tāvū nohot saṃsārayen sundarasthānayaṭa giya bava hetu
koṭageṇa ajarāmara heyin kṣayak næt·tāvū; saḥ, ē sarvajña
tema; śriye ca, trivargasampattiya piṇisada; amṛtāya ca, nivan
piṇisada; sevyatām, topa visin sevunā læbēvā.

mē ślokaya sarvajña sāgaratvayen rūpaṇaya heyin sarvajña
yan·ṭa hā sāgarayaṭa śleṣayi; mehi samudrayāgē agādhatva nam
pātāla talaya nodæk·kahæki bavayi; anaghavū guṇayō nam
ratnākaratvādīhuya; akṣayatva nam paripūrṇa bavayi; śrī nam śrīdeva
tāya; amṛta nam amāyayi datayutu. “yasya jñāna dayāsindhoḥ”
yanādiyen iṣṭadevatāśrīrvāda dæk·vūhu. “śriye ca amṛtāya ca”
yan·nen sakalajñānapravṛttiya phalapramāṇa heyin pravṛttiphala
dæk·vūhu.

mē ślokayehi śleṣayen taman karaṇa śāstrayāgēda
svarūpa kīha hē mesē datayutu: jñānadayā, kavitvavaktṛtvādiyehi
hō aṣṭādaśa vidyāsthānayehi jñānadāna sampattiya hetukoṭa
geṇa; sindhoḥ, sāgaraya vænivū; agādhasya, anantaroktavū guṇa
yōgaya hetukoṭageṇa patul nodæk·ka hæk·kāvū; yasya, yam
śāstrayak·hugē; guṇāḥ, laghutva viṣpaṣṭatvādi guṇayō; anaghāḥ,
śubhahetuhuda; he dhīrāḥ, paṇḍitavaruṇi; akṣayaḥ, sampūrṇavū; saḥ,
ē jñānadayāsindhu temē hevat mē nāmaliṅ·gānuśāsanaya tema.
śriye ca, trivargasampattiya piṇisada nohot vāṅmaya śil·pa dænīma
lakṣaṇakoṭa æti svārtthasampattiya taddhetukatrivargahetuvū parārttha
sampattīya yana mē svārttha sampat parārttha sampat deka piṇisa da;
amṛtāya ca, ē svārtthasampattiyenudu puṇya jñāna sambhārayen
yatnayen siddhavan·nāvū mokṣaya piṇisada; sevyatām, śruti
cintā vyākhyānādi lakṣaṇavū sēvāva karaṇu læbēvā.

mē śāstrapakṣayehi ‘dānan·dāḥ’ yana vākyayehi ḍudāñ dāne
yana dhātuhu keren (sampadādibhyaḥ kvip ca) yi kvip pratyaya kaḷa
kal·hi dā kiyā dvē. “jñānasya dāḥ tasyā ī lakṣmī jñānade” yi vākya
geṇa ṣaṣṭhīsamāsaya koṭa ‘jñānade’ śabdaya siddhakal·hi ohu keren
tṛtīyā kaḷa kala ‘jñānadayā’ yi kiyā rūpaya vēyayi datayutuyi.
